title: LowHealthBorderMod
description: A mod to make the borders of your screen red when low health
body:
[![Available on CurseForge](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_64h.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lowhealthbordermod)
[![Requires Fabric API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/refs/heads/v3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_64h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/)

# LowHealthBorderMod

Its a mod that makes it so if you have low health, it spawns borders around your screen.

#

The border starts becoming larger if you have lower than 3 hearts.
